title: Column popularity is now available in the Catalog Explorer ​
body:
**June 1, 2026**

Column popularity is now available in the Catalog Explorer UI. To find the most popular columns in a table, go to the table's **Overview** tab. Popularity is determined by the number of queries against the table that read from a given column. See [Popularity](/aws/en/discover/table-insights#popularity).
